title: Hate Speech & Disinformation Ecosystem Tracker
description: Near real-time AWS cloud-native framework for detecting sentiment shifts and bot coordination.
problem: Social media becomes a battleground for state-sponsored disinformation during conflicts. Delayed analysis fails to contain systemic harm and coordinated inauthentic behavior.
approach: Designed an AWS event-driven architecture that captures behavioral, structural, and virality-aware risk in near real-time. Implemented NLP pipelines for sentiment classification and graph-based coordination detection to identify anomalous amplification patterns.
impact: Identified coordinated disinformation campaigns with 90%+ precision during Operation Sindoor.

title: Retail Assortment Optimizer (Gurobi × Databricks)
description: Enterprise-grade Mixed-Integer Programming (MIP) solution using Gurobi & Databricks.
problem: Retailers struggle with scaling product assortment decisions under limited raw material inventory, demand uncertainty, and complex multi-constraint optimization.
approach: Scaled Gurobi v12.0 solvers on Databricks clusters to find global optima for high-cardinality assortment puzzles in seconds. Built PySpark data pipelines for feature preparation and integrated solver APIs for batch optimization.
impact: Engineered scalable heuristics for global-scale supply chain decision-support.

title: Physics-Informed Solar PV Loss Estimation
description: Research framework fusing conventional models with a physics-informed Monte Carlo engine.
problem: Conventional PV models ignore temporal memory effects (soiling, humidity cycles), leading to systematic energy yield overestimation in Indian climatic regimes.
approach: Proposed a Physics-Guided Unsupervised Latent Alignment approach, fusing four industry frameworks (L5/L6) into a single latent consensus. Used Monte Carlo simulation with pvlib for scenario-based validation across 72 Indian cities.
impact: Uncovered significant overestimation (p=1.66e-13) in semi-arid regions across 72 Indian cities.

title: Retail Liquidity as Alpha
description: Constructed a retail liquidity factor from UPI transaction data to predict market regimes.
problem: Traditional lagging macro indicators fail to capture high-frequency retail sentiment that often precedes institutional repositioning in Indian equity markets.
approach: Transformed UPI digital payment flows into a daily market signal using PCA-based behavioral extraction and Hidden Markov Model for regime discovery. Built XGBoost classifiers for sector rotation signals.
impact: 18.2% CAGR with Sharpe > 1.4 by forecasting sector rotations via digital liquidity signals.

title: Verse2Vision: Bidirectional Multimodal RAG
description: Bidirectional generative system grounding text and image generation in retrieved multimodal evidence.
problem: Standard multimodal models hallucinate or lose cultural accuracy when generating content across text and image modalities without grounding in verified evidence.
approach: Built a bidirectional RAG architecture that grounds generation in a FAISS-indexed vector store of culturally verified multimodal evidence. Integrated Stable Diffusion for image generation and LangChain for retrieval orchestration.
impact: Improved faithfulness for bidirectional generation in high-stakes cultural contexts.

title: Brandmate: LangGraph Social Media Agent
description: Stateful social media AI agent leveraging LangGraph for complex task evolution and campaign management.
problem: Manual content management lacks state persistence and the ability to evolve campaign tasks over long durations based on user feedback and performance metrics.
approach: Developed stateful orchestration using LangGraph, enabling agents to track campaign state and evolve content strategy autonomously. Integrated LLM-based content generation with structured output for posting workflows.
impact: Automated end-to-end content generation and campaign management cycles with state persistence.

title: FAR-Trans: Hybrid Financial Asset Recommender
description: 3-pillar hybrid engine combining Collaborative Filtering, Content-Based Filtering, and Demographic Scoring.
problem: Traditional recommendation systems fail to balance behavioral trends with fundamental risk profiles and professional fund management attributes.
approach: Engineered a hybrid engine fusing Collaborative (Behavioral), Content-Based (Fundamental), and Demographic (Risk) scoring. Used Scikit-learn for matrix factorization and feature-based models.
impact: Personalized asset allocation with integrated risk-aware demographic scoring filters.

title: NIFTY 3D Implied Volatility Surface
description: Real-time NIFTY 3D surface plotting for Implied Volatility with hybrid mathematical fallback.
problem: Real-time IV surfaces are hard to maintain when external options APIs suffer downtime or block server-side IPs, leaving traders without pricing visibility.
approach: Implemented Cubic Spline interpolation for smooth surface construction and a mathematical IV fallback model (Black-Scholes implied volatility) for 100% service uptime. Built Streamlit dashboard with Plotly for interactive visualization.
impact: Visualized real-time market sentiment and option pricing dynamics for NIFTY derivatives.

title: Market Manipulation Surveillance (ABSA + GCN)
description: Surveillance pipeline using Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) to flag suspicious price movements.
problem: Detecting coordinated market manipulation requires bridging the gap between social sentiment and anomalous price action, which isolated NLP or quant models fail to capture.
approach: Engineered a modular pipeline combining ABSA and emotion-aware NLP for news/social signals with GCN-based graph modeling of expected price behavior. Flagged anomalies where sentiment-driven expectations deviated from observed price paths.
impact: Modeled expected price behavior to detect social-coordination anomalies in equity markets.

title: Smart Healthcare RAG Assistant
description: RAG chatbot for medical Q&A with multi-PDF ingestion and semantic search.
problem: Medical data is scattered across lengthy, unstructured PDFs, making precise information retrieval slow and error-prone for practitioners.
approach: Built a production-ready RAG pipeline using semantic search over chunked documents. Implemented containerized multi-document PDF ingestion with embedding models and FAISS indexing. Deployed with Docker and Streamlit for medical QA.
impact: Real-time accessibility for medical queries via semantic search across heterogeneous healthcare docs.

title: Global Happiness Intelligence Dashboard
description: Multi-layered Tableau framework (2015–2019) for factor decomposition and correlation modeling.
problem: Global happiness is often treated as a scalar, hiding structural socio-economic disparities and factor-level contributions across regions.
approach: Engineered factor decomposition modeling to unpack composite indicators. Integrated Google Trends as a behavioral proxy for emotional sentiment tracking. Built 12+ interactive Tableau dashboards for interpretable drivers (Economy, Health, Social Support).
impact: Decomposed composite indicators into interpretable drivers for policy and travel planning.

title: Eigenportfolio Construction (PCA-Driven)
description: Applied PCA to covariance matrices of DJIA stocks to extract orthogonal risk factors.
problem: Constructing diversified portfolios requires understanding the latent risk structure that traditional sector labels overlook.
approach: Implemented unsupervised PCA on 30 DJIA stocks to identify the dominant eigenvectors of market variance. Used them for portfolio weighting and risk decomposition. Validated via out-of-sample Sharpe ratios.
impact: Identified intelligent portfolios with Sharpe ratios > 1.8 by aligning with market structure.

title: NyayaSetu: MILP Court Scheduling Engine
description: Automated judicial scheduling system with real-time ETL pipelines and Mixed-Integer Linear Programming.
problem: Massive case backlogs in judicial systems are exacerbated by inefficient, manual scheduling processes that ignore resource constraints.
approach: Built a MILP-driven optimization engine for real-time court scheduling. Integrated Kafka for event-driven case intake and Airflow for ETL orchestration. Containerized with Docker for deployment.
impact: Automated scheduling to reduce judicial backlog via mathematical resource optimization.

title: Krishi Saarthi: Multilingual Farming Advisor
description: AI farming advisor for yield prediction featuring a multilingual voice interface.
problem: Rural farmers lack access to localized, data-driven agricultural advisory due to language barriers and complex data interfaces.
approach: Developed a multilingual voice-controlled interface (GTTS) atop a Scikit-learn yield prediction engine. Supported 6+ Indian languages for crop and yield recommendations. Built with Streamlit for accessibility.
impact: Localized advisory support in 6+ Indian languages for yield and crop recommendation.

title: ZARA Growth Visualization Study
description: Hypothesis-driven visualization study of 9 years of sales data uncovering growth drivers.
problem: Raw retail data often fails to communicate the invisible forces driving revenue growth and luxury market positioning.
approach: Engineered 12+ intuitive visual idioms and an Affordable Luxury Index (ALI) via Tableau. Applied hypothesis testing to validate growth drivers. Unboxed strategic insights through visual storytelling.
impact: Unboxed strategic insights into market positioning and sales growth.

title: Women Safety Analytics Dashboard
description: Interactive visualization of 20+ years of crime data in India using a multi-view dashboard.
problem: Analyzing 48+ lakh crime records district-wise requires reducing cognitive load to uncover state-wise disparities and temporal patterns.
approach: Designed a multi-view dashboard using task abstraction and visual idioms (Choropleth, Gantt, Box plots) to reveal temporal surges. Used Pandas for preprocessing and Tableau for interactive dashboards.
impact: Equipped stakeholders with perceptual narratives for region-specific safety interventions.

title: Spotify Emotion-Based Song Clustering
description: Unsupervised learning pipeline (K-Means, DBSCAN) to cluster music based on audio features.
problem: Generic recommendation engines often ignore the nuanced emotional and architectural features (energy, loudness) of niche tracks.
approach: Applied PCA for dimensionality reduction followed by balanced K-Means and DBSCAN to identify noise-aware emotional clusters. Used Spotify API for feature extraction. Built Scikit-learn pipeline for reproducible clustering.
impact: Constructed emotional music profiles for personalized music-based interventions.

title: Mutual Fund Rating Classifier
description: Classification pipeline for 30,000+ mutual funds using SMOTEENN for class imbalance.
problem: Predicting performance ratings for highly imbalanced, multi-currency mutual fund datasets requires sophisticated resampling and high-cardinality feature handling.
approach: Implemented SMOTEENN to handle class skewness and PCA to manage high-cardinality financial metrics and ESG scores. Trained LightGBM for rating prediction with careful validation.
impact: Achieved ~95% accuracy in rating prediction across multi-currency fund datasets.

title: Framefluence: OTT Media DBMS
description: High-performance DBMS designed for streaming platforms and media tracking.
problem: Streaming platforms require high-concurrency database designs to manage cross-border licensing and multi-tenant billing.
approach: Engineered a physical design with rigorous normalization to mirror industry giants (Netflix) for media analytics. Designed conceptual and logical schemas for content, licensing, and billing domains.
impact: Optimized cross-border licensing and billing data flows for OTT services.

title: User-Centric Sentiment Forecasting (GCN)
description: NLP system using Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) for emotional trajectory modeling.
problem: Transformer models often ignore syntactic dependencies, making it hard to forecast emotional shifts in irregular user feedback across time.
approach: Combined syntactic dependency graphs with time-aware user representations using GCNs. Built on PyTorch with Transformers for baseline comparison. Achieved improved forecasting of multi-aspect sentiment trajectories.
impact: Outperformed base Transformer models in forecasting multi-aspect sentiment trajectories.

title: Deterministic Multi-Agent Backtesting Engine
description: Deterministic backtesting engine built for QuantX India with cryptographic audit trails.
problem: Quantitative backtests often lack deterministic auditability, making it hard to verify strategy logic post-refactoring and comply with institutional requirements.
approach: Architected a deterministic multi-agent framework that translates strategy intent into executable configurations. Implemented rule-based parsing, validation, and cryptographic execution hashes for full auditability. Built a fully deterministic execution engine for trade simulation.
impact: Ensured strategy logic remains immutable and auditable for institutional test runs.
